pageNotFoundDesc: The page you are looking for does not exist.
changePasswordDesc: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
signInLinkExpired: That sign-in link has expired. Enter your password to sign in.
signInLinkInvalid: That sign-in link is no longer valid. Enter your password to sign in.
nothingWaitingDesc: When an agent needs your input or someone comments on a file, it will show up here.
couldntLoadInboxItems_one: Couldn't load inbox items from 1 session.
couldntLoadInboxItems_other: Couldn't load inbox items from {{count}} sessions.
shareSessionDesc: Invite others to view or collaborate on this session.
couldNotLoadMembers: Could not load members. You may not have admin permission, or the server is unreachable.
addPolicyDesc: Choose a policy to apply globally to all sessions.
addPolicySessionDesc: Choose a policy to apply to this session.
allPoliciesApplied: All available policies are already applied.
allChangesInHiddenFiles: All changes are in hidden files.
allFilesHidden: All files are hidden — click the eye icon to reveal them.
describeTask: Describe a task to start a new session…
describeTaskAria: Describe a task to start a new session
describeTaskOrSkill: Describe a task, or try a skill
usernameHintPrefix: On a fresh install your username is your machine login (the output of
usernameHintSuffix: ), unless an admin set a different one.
adminPasswordHintPrefix: On a fresh install the initial admin password was printed to the server's stderr and saved to
invitedToJoin: You were invited to join this Omnigent server.
missingInviteToken: This page needs an invite token in the URL — make sure you opened the link your admin sent you.
passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.
usernamePatternTitle: Lowercase letters, digits, dots, hyphens, underscores (or a lowercase email)
usernamePatternHint: Lowercase letters, digits, dots, hyphens, underscores — or a lowercase email.
noPermissionToManage: You don't have permission to manage members.
inviteDesc: A single-use invite URL will be created. Share it with the person you want to add. They'll choose their own username and password when they redeem it.
inviteUrlDesc: Send this URL to the new member. It expires in {{expiry}} and is single-use — once they redeem it, it can't be used again. This URL is shown only once.
resetPasswordDesc: Send this password to the user out-of-band (e.g. Slack DM). It is shown only once.
removeUserConfirmDesc: This deletes the user account and revokes all their session permissions. Sessions they own become inaccessible unless another user has manage rights on them. This action cannot be undone.
keyboardShortcutsDescription: The keyboard shortcuts available in the chat.
shortcutsSlashCommandsNote: while the suggestions menu is open
terminalSelectionHintMac: Hold ⌥ and drag to select · ⌘C to copy
terminalSelectionHintOther: Hold Shift and drag to select · right-click to copy
planFeedbackPlaceholder: What should change about the plan? (optional)
wontAskAgainForHost: Won't ask again for {{host}} for the rest of this session
wontAskAgainForTool: Won't ask again for any {{tool}} call for the rest of this session
claudeFinishedPlanning: Claude finished planning and wants to proceed.
codexWantsToRunCommand: Codex wants to run this command.
globalPoliciesSubtitle: Global policies applied to all sessions.
noPermissionGlobalPolicies: You don't have permission to manage global policies.
noGlobalPoliciesConfigured: No global policies configured. Add one to apply it to all sessions.
removePolicyConfirmDesc: This removes the global policy from all sessions. Existing session-level policies with the same handler are unaffected.
elicitationResolvedDesc: This approval request is no longer pending. It may have been resolved, timed out, or cancelled.
createAdminDesc: First run — pick the username and password for this server's admin. You can invite others once you're in.
hostOfflineClickToReconnect: Host is offline — click to reconnect
startingUpTerminalReady: Starting up… getting your terminal ready.
settingUpSandbox: Setting up your sandbox — this can take a minute.
gettingTerminalReady: Getting your terminal ready — this can take a few seconds.
sendMessageToGetStarted: Send a message to get started.
composerReadOnlyAccess: You have read-only access to this session
composerSessionOffline: Session offline — reconnect below to continue
composerRespondToPending: Respond to the pending request above to continue
composerSendFollowUp: Send a follow-up (queued) — Esc to stop
composerSandboxAsleep: Current session's host is offline. Next message will resume the sandbox host which can take minutes
composerSendToReconnect: Send a message to reconnect this session
noUsageDataYet: No usage data yet — send a message first.
filesInHiddenDirsClickToShow_one: {{count}} file in hidden directories. Click to show.
filesInHiddenDirsClickToShow_other: {{count}} files in hidden directories. Click to show.
readOnlyAccess: You have read-only access to this session.
sendMessageToReconnect: Send a message in the chat to reconnect.
fileModifiedExternally: This file was modified externally while you were editing.
runnerOfflineSaveCommenting: Runner offline — changes save and commenting resumes once it reconnects.
savingCommentingAvailable: Saving… commenting is available once saved.
unsavedCommentingAvailable: Unsaved changes — commenting is available once saved.
selectHostToChooseDir: Select a host to choose a directory.
directoryMismatchWarning: This directory differs from the original session's. Earlier file references in the transcript may not apply — the agent will need to re-orient.
baseBranchPlaceholderCurrent: Base branch (defaults to the current branch)
gitWorktreeCloneHelp: Creates a git worktree for a new branch in an isolated directory — keeps the clone from fighting the original over the same files. Leave blank to start in the picked directory.
switchAgentDesc: Continue this session on a different agent. The conversation, comments, and files stay; the next message runs on the new agent.
switchAgentError: Couldn't switch the agent. Try again.
switchAgentResetWarning: Model & reasoning effort will reset to {{agent}}'s defaults (different provider).
resumeThisSessionDesc: This clone hasn't picked a working directory yet. Choose a host and directory to continue the conversation against your files.
resumeHostOfflineHint: The original session's host is offline, so there's nothing to launch a runner on. Reconnect it from your terminal — then send your message again to pick a directory.
couldntStartSession: Couldn't start the session. Try again.
conflictHintBelow_one: 1 other agent is working in this directory. Write operations may conflict. Name a git branch below to work in an isolated copy.
conflictHintBelow_other: {{count}} other agents are working in this directory. Write operations may conflict. Name a git branch below to work in an isolated copy.
cloneDescFull: Copies this session's history into a new session you own
cloneDescTruncated: Copies this session's history up to the selected response into a new session you own — messages after it aren't carried over
cloneDescThenStarts: , then starts it on the host and directory you pick
cloneDescSuffix: . Comments aren't copied, and changes in the clone won't affect the original.
couldntCloneSession: Couldn't clone the session. Try again.
noHostsConnectedConnectOne: No hosts connected yet. Connect one from your terminal:
noHostsOnlineReconnectClone: No hosts online. Reconnect from your terminal to start the clone:
connectAnotherHost: Connect another host from your terminal
reuseDirHintPrefix: By default the clone reuses the original session's
reuseDirHintSuffix: . Open Advanced settings to change it.
conflictHintAdvanced_one: 1 other agent is working in this directory, so writes may conflict. Name a git branch under Advanced settings to work in an isolated copy.
conflictHintAdvanced_other: {{count}} other agents are working in this directory, so writes may conflict. Name a git branch under Advanced settings to work in an isolated copy.
repoClonedHelp: Cloned into the sandbox as the session's working directory. Leave blank to start in an empty workspace.
databricksGitCredentialsHelp: How to set up Databricks git credentials
gitWorktreeLandingHelp: Creates an isolated git worktree for a new branch. Leave blank to start directly in the working directory.
connectHostMenuHint: Run this on the machine you want to use, then pick it from the host menu:
couldntReachServer: Couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
enterValidRepoUrl: Please enter a valid repository URL
chooseHostAndDirectory: Please choose a host and working directory
enterMessageToStart: Enter a message to get started
permMode_auto_desc: Auto-runs; a classifier blocks risky actions
permMode_acceptEdits_desc: Auto-applies file edits; commands still prompt
permMode_bypassPermissions_desc: Runs everything; no prompts or safety checks
approvalMode_default_desc: Read/edit/run in workspace; approval for external edits or network
approvalMode_full-access_desc: Edit any file and access the internet without approval
approvalMode_read-only_desc: Read files only; approval required for edits, commands, or network
editorSaveOfflineTitle: Runner offline — your changes will save when it reconnects
noAgentsRegisterPrefix: No agents available on this server. Register one with
name: Name
enterAgentName: Enter a name for the agent.
couldntAddAgent: Couldn't add the agent. Try again.
appearanceDesc: Choose how Omnigent looks on this device.
appearanceHostControlled: Appearance is controlled by the host application.
shortcutsDesc: Speed up common actions with the keyboard.
archivedSessionsDesc: Sessions you've archived. Restore one to the sidebar, or delete it for good.
deleteSessionDescSuffix: and all of its history will be removed. This cannot be undone.
